chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5593 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.23453/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 06.03.2025 Mr.Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Mukesh Kumar Khatri, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent (F.B.R), which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the issue involved in the instant petition stands squarely covered by the decision given in the case of Atlas Honda Ltd. through authorized Attorney v. Pakistan through Secretary Revenue and 3 others (2022 PTD 866). The stated position has been endorsed by the learned counsel appearing for the Department. The instant petition stands disposed of in the same terms as decided in the above referred matter, along-with listed application. Judge Judge nasir
